en: Can I help you? Hey. My friend was here earlier.
Yeah. Did they find his brother-in-law? Is he okay?
No, no. No, we haven't found him yet.
We're really worried. Sorry to hear about that.
Yeah. So, I was wondering if there's maybe something that, you know, my friend missed?
ko: 그래서, 혹시 제 친구가 놓친 게 있을까 해서요?

en: I showed him everything I've got. Show me what you showed him.
Maybe you should just call your friend.
I did. And, you know, you told me to come back and take another look. I'd really appreciate it.
I can't. I'm sorry. Hey. You'd better just call the police.
Sure. Sure. Travel Wire. This is Fred.
